research_topic: AU SMB AI market landscape + competitor teardowns
key_insight: 37% of AU SMBs "adopted" AI but only 5% fully enabled — the real market is frustrated early adopters, not skeptics
Government grants mostly inaccessible to solo operator directly; best angle is subcontracting to ASBAS grantees; cohort model offers 8x revenue multiplication
Industry association speaking (not AI conferences) is high-ROI for SMB acquisition; online course deferred — requires content audience first

research_topic: Fractional AI Officer + Microsoft partner + contrarian bet
key_insight: Fractional AI Officer is the strategic evolution of DFY — 3 clients × $6K/month = $18K MRR; contrarian budget taster captures skeptic segment as funnel entry

research_topic: Option A WWHTBT stress test + platform partner addition
key_insight: All 4 WWHTBT conditions for Option A validated with mitigations; options A+K+H+B+C+J+D form a complete customer acquisition and value escalation funnel

research_topic: Reviewer challenges response + owner constraints integrated
key_insight: Stealth constraint eliminates LinkedIn (primary awareness channel); forces higher-quality relationship-driven acquisition; n8n/Make.com replaced by Anthropic Claude Partner Network

research_topic: Strategic fork WWHTBT: Path A (acquisition first) vs Path B (productize first)
key_insight: Path B is the prerequisite for Path A — productization takes 10 hours and makes every acquisition channel permanently more efficient; false dilemma resolved

research_topic: Deep pricing analysis — AU market benchmarks + value-based rationale
key_insight: DecisionBetter is priced 45-80% below AI Avenue for comparable customised workshops; prices are under-market for entry; 20-30% price increase justified after 10+ reviews

research_topic: Stealth-compatible acquisition channels + Option O (direct outreach) added
key_insight: Stealth constraint reveals better acquisition stack: referral (40-60% conversion) beats content marketing (1-2%); direct outreach + private speaking + Anthropic directory replace LinkedIn

research_topic: AI-Delivered Training Platform (Option M) + first full portfolio view
key_insight: Phase 1 workshops = Phase 3 curriculum IP; three-phase strategy (foundation → recurring → platform) is the coherent long-term architecture; Option M is the ultimate strategic bet
